modules.explanation: Relations connect elements through ordered pairs, while functions are special relations where each input has exactly one output. Class 12 goes deeper into reflexive, symmetric, transitive and equivalence relations, plus one-one, onto, composition and invertible functions. Think of a function as a dependable machine: one input should produce one clear output.
